Components / Task List

Preview theme

Task List

Collapsible progress tracker for ordered task sequences. Shows completed, in-progress, and pending states with an animated progress fill in the header.

Mixed states

completedCount={2}, isActive={true} — completed, in-progress, and pending
  1. 1Set up project repository
  2. 2Design database schema
  3. 3Implement authentication
  4. 4Build API endpoints

Collapsed

defaultExpanded={false} — header only, click to expand

All complete

completedCount={items.length}, isActive={false} — full progress bar
  1. 1Set up project repository
  2. 2Design database schema
  3. 3Implement authentication
  4. 4Build API endpoints

Shadow-border surface

surface="shadow-border"
  1. 1Set up project repository
  2. 2Design database schema
  3. 3Implement authentication
  4. 4Build API endpoints

With timestamp

updatedAt="Updated 2m ago"
  1. 1Set up project repository
  2. 2Design database schema
  3. 3Implement authentication
  4. 4Build API endpoints

Props

PropTypeDefaultDescription
itemsstring[]—Ordered list of task label strings.
completedCountnumber0Number of tasks that have been completed (from the start of the list).
isActivebooleanautoWhether a task is currently in progress. Defaults to true when completedCount < items.length.
updatedAtstring—Optional timestamp shown in the header (e.g. "Updated 2m ago").
defaultExpandedbooleantrueWhether the task list body is expanded on initial render.
surface"default" | "shadow-border""default"Surface treatment — adds shadow and border in shadow-border mode.
disableMotionbooleanfalseDisables expand/collapse and icon animations.
classNamestring—Extra classes merged onto the root element.

Usage

tsx
import { TaskList } from '@spaceship/design-system';

const items = [
  'Set up project repository',
  'Design database schema',
  'Implement authentication',
  'Build API endpoints',
];

<TaskList
  items={items}
  completedCount={2}
  isActive
  updatedAt="Updated 2m ago"
/>
